banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock filer: a single Singapore tax resident employee whose employer participates in the Auto-Inclusion Scheme, with one qualifying child, a supported parent, a life insurance policy and SRS contributions, filing Year of Assessment 2026 via myTax Portal. No rental, self-employment, overseas, or other additional income. All names, numbers, and amounts are fabricated test data, not a real taxpayer's information.

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (sg/iras/individual-income-tax-return-formb1). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to the Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore or any government system. A human (the taxpayer) must review every value below against their actual myTax Portal pre-filled screens — myTax Portal auto-fills most income and relief figures from employers, previous returns, and other third parties, so the real return may differ from this fabricated scenario — confirm each figure, and explicitly authorize submission through IRAS's own myTax Portal before this return is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
